name: Patch build fails because merge base cannot be retrieved
query: Our patch build command fails with merge base not found.
context: The customer used `--patch-build head...base` and Chromatic failed to retrieve the merge base for those refs.
expected_behavior: Explains that the head branch must descend from the base branch for that patch-build path
Requests or recommends `git merge-base <head> <base>` as the single proof point
success_criteria: The response stays focused on the merge-base relationship
The response does not suggest unrelated baseline flags
